packs.name: Emberwatch: The Fading Ward
packs.description: The wardstone that protects Emberwatch Village is failing. Strange creatures prowl the Old Road, and the ruined shrine holds secrets that could save the village — or doom it forever.

packs.name: Whispering Caves
packs.description: Deep beneath the foothills, an ancient network of caves hums with crystalline energy. A reclusive hermit warns of stirring shadows, and a forgotten altar holds the key to the caves' whispered secrets.
